hero.description: Passionate about building modern, scalable web applications. I bridge the gap between elegant frontends and robust backend systems.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I'm a Full Stack Developer currently studying Systems Analysis at Instituto de Educación Superior Nº11, with specialized training from Fundación Pescar in full stack web development and software engineering.
about.p2: I have hands-on experience building web applications with modern technologies such as React, Node.js, JavaScript, and SQL/NoSQL databases. I'm driven by creating clean, efficient, and user-friendly digital experiences.
about.p3: When I'm not coding, I'm exploring new technologies and working on personal projects to continuously sharpen my skills and stay ahead of the curve.
